title: tridens riograndensis
intro: Tridens riograndensis, also known as Rio Grande Needle Grass, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Tridens riograndensis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
